evidence.work_arrangement: This is a fully remote role.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: you will work to make Wave's data easy, safe, and reliable to use, enabling better products for our customers... CI/CD checks that catch possibly exploding joins
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD names reliability, safety, and CI/CD quality checks alongside iteration/optimization and product-velocity language in roughly equal measure, landing on mixed.
evidence.domain_risk: Wave is now the largest financial institution in Senegal, with over 7 million users
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Wave is a fintech/mobile money provider, but the JD frames the AE role around internal data modeling and platform work rather than explicit regulatory/compliance duties for the role itself, so moderate applies.
evidence.jd_authorship: Building out facts, dimensions and One Big Tables (OBTs) as appropriate for a focus area at Wave... Creating helpful dbt macros. CI/CD checks that catch possibly exploding joins.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD gives highly specific, technical detail (OBTs, dbt macros, exploding-join CI checks, Snowflake estate management) that only someone who knows the actual day-to-day work would write.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: working closely with domain partners to understand what's useful to them... collaborating closely with operations teams to drive growth through data
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The JD references domain partners and operations teams generically across focus areas without naming a single dominant commercial, product, or finance function, so mixed applies.
evidence.autonomy_level: Be a key partner in the road map of the data platform team... Champion best practice across data.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role builds specific pipelines, models, and tooling to a largely self-directed but delivery-scoped remit (on-duty rotations, ETL health) rather than setting company-wide data strategy, an execution orientation.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Be responsible for the design, build and health of all of our ETL pipelines... Managing our extensive snowflake estate with a strong analytical mindset.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role manages and optimizes an already "extensive" existing Snowflake estate and ETL pipelines rather than building new infrastructure from scratch, an extend/fix framing.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Managing our extensive snowflake estate with a strong analytical mindset... Building tools to identify and turn off stale/unused models.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The JD describes an extensive, established Snowflake estate with accumulated technical debt (stale/unused models) to clean up and optimize, indicating a mid-maturity, actively growing function rather than a first build.
evidence.ai_role: Building out ways to make it easy to add context for LLMs to data models.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Candidate is responsible for building data structures/context specifically to serve downstream AI/LLM consumption.
evidence.testing_framing: CI/CD checks that catch possibly exploding joins.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Candidate builds and owns testing/CI checks as part of the analytics development experience, not just a listed skill.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Be responsible for the design, build and health of all of our ETL pipelines. Part of the role includes being 'on-duty'.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: On-duty responsibility for pipeline health signals operational reliability concern, but there is no compliance/regulatory/stakeholder-trust framing.
